summary.summary: Update Config.xcconfig: APP_DEV_VERSION changed from 0.8.4 to 0.8.4.1.
summary.userFacingImpact: The commit updates APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4 to 0.8.4.1 (see commit:fc4e69d9124f, diff:d5270ae16cc4, file:30b6781112af). This is a build/configuration version number change; the provided diff contains only this config edit and does not provide information about any runtime or user-visible behavior changes, so the user impact cannot be determined from the supplied change alone. Human review is recommended to assess any downstream effects.
